name: Product Launch Campaign
description: Launch a digital product with a full pre-launch, launch day, and post-launch sequence

automation.followUp: Send pre-launch email 3 days before launch

automation.action: Send launch email to full list

assets.title: Product Landing Page
assets.content:
HEADLINE:
[Achieve Specific Outcome] in [Timeframe] — Even If [Common Objection]

SUBHEADLINE:
[Product Name] is a [format: course/template/tool/guide] that helps [target audience] [achieve outcome] without [pain point].

THE PROBLEM (Agitate):
You already know you need to [desired outcome].

The problem isn't motivation. It's that:
• [Pain point 1]
• [Pain point 2]
• [Pain point 3]

You've probably already tried [common solution] and it didn't work because [reason].

THE SOLUTION:
[Product Name] gives you [what it is] so you can [outcome] — without [the hard part].

WHAT'S INSIDE:
✓ [Module/Section 1] — [what they learn/get]
✓ [Module/Section 2] — [what they learn/get]
✓ [Module/Section 3] — [what they learn/get]
✓ [Bonus] — [value of bonus]

WHO THIS IS FOR:
→ [Ideal customer 1]
→ [Ideal customer 2]
→ [Ideal customer 3]

WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:
→ [Exclusion 1]
→ [Exclusion 2]

TESTIMONIALS:
"[Testimonial 1]"
— [Name, Role]

"[Testimonial 2]"
— [Name, Role]

PRICING:
Launch Price: $[XX] (Regular price: $[XX])
Offer expires: [Date]

[BUY NOW BUTTON]

GUARANTEE:
[Your guarantee — e.g., 30-day money-back guarantee]

FAQ:
Q: [Common question 1]
A: [Answer]

Q: [Common question 2]
A: [Answer]

Q: [Common question 3]
A: [Answer]

assets.title: Pre-Launch Email — Build Anticipation
assets.content:
Subject: Something I've been working on (launches [Day])

Hey [First Name],

I've been working on something for the past [timeframe] and I'm finally ready to share it.

[SHORT ORIGIN STORY — why you built this]

The problem I kept seeing was [the specific problem].

I tried [existing solutions] and they all fell short because [reason].

So I built [Product Name].

[2-3 sentences on what it is and what it does]

It launches [DATE] at [TIME].

Before then, I'm sharing it with my list first — and at a special launch price that won't be available after [DATE].

I'll send you all the details on launch day.

For now, I just want to know: is [the core problem] something you're dealing with?

Hit reply and let me know. I'm reading every response.

[Your name]

P.S. If you know someone dealing with [problem], forward this to them. They'll thank you.

assets.title: Launch Day Email
assets.content:
Subject: It's live — [Product Name]

Hey [First Name],

Today's the day. [Product Name] is officially live.

[LINK TO SALES PAGE]

Here's a quick recap of what you get:

✓ [Key deliverable 1]
✓ [Key deliverable 2]
✓ [Key deliverable 3]
✓ [Bonus]

Launch price: $[XX] (goes up to $[XX] on [DATE])

This is for you if:
→ You're a [ideal customer description]
→ You want to [specific outcome]
→ You're ready to [commitment required]

Not sure if it's right for you? Here's what [Customer Name] said after going through it:

"[Testimonial]"

[BUTTON: Get [Product Name] — $XX]

Questions? Just reply to this email. I'm here.

[Your name]

P.S. The launch price disappears at [specific time/date]. After that, it goes back to $[full price].

assets.title: Mid-Launch Email — Objection Handling
assets.content:
Subject: The #1 question I'm getting about [Product Name]

Hey [First Name],

[Product Name] has been live for [X] days and I've gotten a ton of responses.

The most common question:

"[Most common objection or question]"

Great question. Here's the honest answer:

[DIRECT ANSWER — be specific and reassuring]

A few others I've heard:

"Is this for me if [scenario]?"
→ [Answer]

"What if [concern]?"
→ [Answer]

"How long does it take to [achieve result]?"
→ [Answer]

If you're still on the fence, here's what I'd say:

[CLOSE THE OBJECTION — restate the value, remind of the guarantee, create urgency]

The launch price closes [DATE/TIME].

[LINK: Get [Product Name] now]

[Your name]

assets.title: Last-Chance Email
assets.content:
Subject: Last chance — price goes up tonight

Hey [First Name],

Quick heads up: [Product Name] launch pricing ends tonight at [TIME].

After that, the price goes from $[XX] to $[XX].

[LINK TO SALES PAGE]

If you've been thinking about it, now is the time.

Here's what you're getting:

[SHORT BULLETS — 3-4 key deliverables]

+ [Guarantee statement]

And here's the thing:

[ONE LAST COMPELLING REASON — results, transformation, or urgency angle]

Door closes at [TIME] tonight.

[BUTTON: Get Access Before Price Increases]

Talk soon,
[Your name]

P.S. If you missed out and the price has already gone up, reply to this email. I'll see what I can do.

assets.title: Launch Announcement Post
assets.content:
After [timeframe] of work, it's finally here.

Introducing: [PRODUCT NAME]

[One sentence on what it is]

I built this because [origin story in 2-3 sentences].

Here's what's inside:

→ [Key feature/module 1]
→ [Key feature/module 2]
→ [Key feature/module 3]
→ [Bonus]

Who it's for:
✓ [Ideal customer 1]
✓ [Ideal customer 2]
✓ [Ideal customer 3]

Launch pricing: $[XX] through [DATE]

[LINK TO SALES PAGE]

If you know someone who would benefit from this, please share. It would mean the world.

assets.title: Behind-the-Scenes Post
assets.content:
I've been building something in public for the last [timeframe].

Here's what the process actually looked like:

Week 1: [What happened — the messy start]
Week 2: [The struggle or pivot]
Week 3: [The breakthrough]
Week [X]: [Where you landed]

The hardest part was [honest answer].

The most surprising thing I learned was [genuine insight].

If I could go back and do it differently, I would have [one thing].

[PRODUCT NAME] launches [DATE].

Link in bio (or comment "LAUNCH" and I'll send it to you directly).

assets.title: Social Proof Post
assets.content:
Before I launched [PRODUCT NAME], I gave early access to [X] people.

Here's what they said:

"[Testimonial 1 — specific result or transformation]"
— [Name, Role]

"[Testimonial 2]"
— [Name, Role]

"[Testimonial 3]"
— [Name, Role]

This isn't for everyone. It's specifically for [ideal customer].

Launch price: $[XX] — available until [DATE].

[LINK]

assets.title: Countdown Post
assets.content:
⏱ [X] hours left at launch pricing.

[PRODUCT NAME] goes from $[XX] → $[XX] tonight.

Quick reminder of what you get:
✓ [Benefit 1]
✓ [Benefit 2]
✓ [Benefit 3]
✓ [Guarantee]

This is for you if [ideal customer description + specific outcome].

[LINK — get it before price increases]

After tonight: full price, no exceptions.

assets.title: Post-Launch Reflection
assets.content:
The launch is over. Here are the real numbers:

📦 Units sold: [X]
💰 Revenue: $[XX]
📧 Emails sent: [X]
⭐ Avg. rating from early users: [X]/5

What worked:
✓ [What drove the most sales]
✓ [What surprised me]
✓ [What I'd do again]

What didn't:
✗ [Honest miss]
✗ [What I'd change]

Biggest lesson: [Your key takeaway]

Thanks to everyone who bought and gave feedback. Building in public is scary but it's the only way I know how to grow.

[PRODUCT NAME] is still available at [current price]: [LINK]
